# LoL Sensei

> AI coaching application for League of Legends

LoL Sensei is a free AI-powered coaching tool that helps League of Legends players learn and improve. It provides real-time guidance during champion select and in-game, teaching players why certain decisions are made — not just what to do.

## Key Features
- Champion Select Coach: Learn team synergies and counter-picks
- Lane Strategy Guide: Understand matchups and win conditions
- Build Advisor: Know why items are recommended based on game state
- Low performance impact: < 1% CPU, ~150MB RAM (AI processing on remote servers)
- Pre-match educational content only — no real-time in-game alerts during live play
- Riot API usage: read-only public data via official Riot Games API, user consent required for Riot ID linking

## Pricing
- Free tier: Champion select coaching, game start strategy, real-time build advisor
- Pro tier (€7.99/month): All free features + priority server access

## Links
- Website: https://www.lolsensei.com
- Download: https://www.lolsensei.com/downloads/LoLSensei-Setup.exe

## Languages
Available in English, Italian, Korean, Chinese, Portuguese (BR), Spanish, French, and German.
